backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining data types (UserProfile, Workout, Transaction, MealLog, DailyMetrics) and CRUD endpoints for fitness, finance, meal, and profile data with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to their associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for PWA, responsive layout, and service worker features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted reference document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart palette, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the FinFit PWA with viewport, theme-color, Apple mobile web app meta tags, manifest link, and app icon references.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest configured with standalone display, portrait orientation, correct start_url and scope, and both 192x192 and 512x512 maskable and any-purpose icons.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker that pre-caches app shell assets on install, bypasses ICP/Internet Identity network calls, uses network-first for navigation with offline fallback, and cache-first for static assets.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that conditionally registers the service worker on secure origins, and renders AuthScreen, ProfileSetupModal, or Dashboard based on authentication and profile state.
frontend/src/components/CurrencySelector: A dropdown component that lets users select their preferred currency from a predefined list and saves the selection to their profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/DailyMetricsForm: A form component for logging daily health metrics (calories, steps, date) that submits data via a mutation hook and shows success/error toasts.
frontend/src/components/FinanceAISuggest: Generates and displays personalized financial suggestions based on transaction categories, the 50/30/20 rule, user income, and profession-specific tips.
A monthly calendar view that displays transactions grouped by date with color-coded category indicators and a detail panel for the selected day.
frontend/src/components/FinanceProfileFo: A form for saving the user's monthly income and profession to their finance profile, with validation and loading state handling.
frontend/src/components/FitnessAISuggest: Generates personalized fitness suggestions based on user goals, BMI, workout history, daily metrics, calorie intake, and step counts, including cut/bulk-specific advice.
A monthly calendar component that displays workout and daily metrics data, allowing users to navigate months and click on dates to view details for that day.
frontend/src/components/FitnessProfileFo: A form component for updating a user's fitness profile including body weight, height, goal weight, and workout split, with optimistic UI and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying the app copyright year and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/GoalSelector.tsx: A toggle button component that lets users switch between 'Cut' and 'Bulk' fitness goals with optimistic updates and error rollback.
frontend/src/components/MealList.tsx: Displays a list of logged meals for a given date, filtered from all meal logs, along with a daily calorie total.
frontend/src/components/MealLogForm.tsx: A form for logging meals that includes a client-side heuristic calorie estimator based on food keywords and portion size parsing.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: An onboarding modal dialog that collects a new user's basic info, financial details, and fitness profile on first setup.
frontend/src/components/StepTrackerWidge: File content was not provided; likely a widget component for tracking and displaying daily step count data.
Renders a sorted list of financial transactions with category icons, formatted dates, and color-coded amounts. Shows an empty state when no transactions exist.
frontend/src/components/TransactionLogFo: Form component for logging a new financial transaction with description, amount, category (needs/saving/investment/other), and date fields. Submits via the useLogTransaction mutation and shows toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/WorkoutLogForm.t: Form component for logging a workout entry with muscle group, exercise name, sets, reps, weight, duration, and date. Includes a live calorie burn preview calculated from the exercise inputs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity persistence, and status tracking via a React context and AuthClient. Exports both the provider component and the useInternetIdentity hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, workouts, daily metrics, transactions, and finance profile. Each hook wires up the ICP actor from useActor.
frontend/src/hooks/useStepTracker.ts: A React hook that tracks daily step counts using the DeviceMotion API, applying a low-pass filter and peak detection algorithm, with localStorage persistence and optional auto-save callback.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, configures Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the FinFit theme including fitness, finance, and primary accent colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AuthScreen.tsx: Authentication screen displaying a hero section with feature highlights and a login/sign-up panel that uses Internet Identity for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard layout with a sticky header showing the user's principal, a bottom navigation bar to switch between Fitness and Finance sections, and a logout button.
frontend/src/pages/FinanceSection.tsx: Finance section page showing quick stats (total spend, savings, investments), a finance profile form, currency selector, transaction log form, and tabbed views for transaction list and AI advisor.
frontend/src/pages/FitnessSection.tsx: Main fitness dashboard page displaying today's workout/calorie/step stats, a manual step counter with calorie estimation, and tabbed views for AI suggestions, calendar, and meal logging. Composes multiple sub-components and uses React Query hooks for data fetching.
frontend/src/utils/calorieCalculator.ts: MET-based calorie burn calculator that maps exercise names and muscle groups to MET values via a keyword lookup table, then computes calories as MET × weight × duration. Exports functions for single-exercise and total workout calorie estimation.
frontend/src/utils/stepCalorieCalculator: Estimates calories burned from step count using a weight-adjusted heuristic (~0.04 kcal/step at 70 kg), scaling linearly with body weight.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color tokens (using OKLCH variables for brand, chart, and sidebar colors), extended border radii, box shadows, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the FinFit app tracking schema version, existing PWA/mobile features (manifest, service worker, responsive layout), a pending new feature request for mobile/app compatibility, and image requirements for app icons.
